title: dalbergaria picta
intro: Dalbergaria picta, also known as the "Picta Wisteria", is a perennial climber belonging to the legume family (Fabaceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of various alkaloids and flavonoids that possess anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Dalbergaria picta include its use in treating fever, respiratory issues, and as an anti-aging agent. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are often used in traditional medicine to alleviate various health conditions.
intro_study: According to "Zhongguo Zhong yao za zhi = Zhongguo zhongyao zazhi = China journal of Chinese materia medica", dalbergaria picta benefits from the variety of pharmacological activities displayed by its neoflavonoids, including anti-osteoporosis, anti-inflammatory, antitumor, anti-androgen, anti-allergic, and antioxidation properties.
